title: Glazin 8x: Aether Edition
description: Glazin 8x Mod Support for the Aether Legacy Project.
body:
Glazin 8x: Aether Edition
September 1st, 2025

  The Glazin 8x Style has been introduced to The Aether Mod. This Mod Support includes some of the most updated textures and palletes that can be found in Glazin 8x to date.
